# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent message queue security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure shared event queue with least-privilege access policy

Parameters:
  AllowedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of AWS account IDs allowed to send and receive messages
    AllowedPattern: "^[0-9]{12}$"
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "shared-event-queue-${EnvironmentName}"
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "shared-event-dlq-${EnvironmentName}"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false

  QueueEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Encryption key for shared event queue
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowKeyAdministration
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action:
              - kms:Create*
              - kms:Describe*
              - kms:Enable*
              - kms:List*
              - kms:Put*
              - kms:Update*
              - kms:Revoke*
              - kms:Disable*
              - kms:Get*
              - kms:Delete*
              - kms:TagResource
              - kms:UntagResource
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowKeyUsageForSQS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ","
                - !Sub
                  - "${Accounts}"
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ","
                      - !Ref AllowedAccountIds
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub "sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"

  SharedEventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendMessageFromTrustedAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ","
                - !Sub
                  - "${Accounts}"
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ","
                      - !Ref AllowedAccountIds
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "true"
          - Sid: AllowReceiveMessageFromTrustedAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ","
                - !Sub
                  - "${Accounts}"
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ","
                      - !Ref AllowedAccountIds
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "true"
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"
          - Sid: DenyAllUnauthorizedAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotLike:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AllowedAccountIds

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: "false"

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the shared event queue
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared event queue
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
